name: Milky Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
Melt the chocolates over hot water in a double boiler, stirring often. Once melted, transfer to a serving dish and allow to cool.
Froth egg whites until they hold their shape but remain moist and shiny.
Combine egg yolks with the cooled chocolate mixture using a spatula.
Gently fold in 1/4 of the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
Add the remaining egg whites and stir gently.
Whip the cream until thickened, then fold it into the chocolate mixture.
Smooth the surface with a spatula. Wipe the bowl clean with a paper towel. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
Serve chilled. Makes 8 servings.
Joyce
(waiting for the rains in So. Ca.)
